_howto: Add your own hosted audio tracks below to play them in-game with ZERO YouTube (so nothing gets blocked by ad-blockers). Each track: title, src (a direct https URL to an mp3/ogg/m4a you host, e.g. on speedygowild.xyz), and optional art (cover image URL). While 'tracks' is empty the game falls back to the YouTube embed. Example: { "title": "City Escapes", "src": "https://speedygowild.xyz/music/city-escapes.mp3", "art": "https://speedygowild.xyz/music/city-escapes.jpg" }
